Home / Services / Estate Planning

Estate Planning in Cheltenham

Protect what you've built.
Pass it on wisely.

Protect your legacy and pass wealth efficiently to those you love. We help Cheltenham and Gloucestershire residents reduce inheritance tax through proper planning and legitimate strategies.

IHT strategies

Rising property values across Gloucestershire create significant IHT exposure

With property values increasing across the region, many Cheltenham and Gloucestershire residents face inheritance tax bills that can force the sale of family homes. Proper planning is essential.

Understanding the challenge

Why Estate Planning Matters for Cheltenham and Gloucestershire Families

The problem

Rising property values across Cheltenham and Gloucestershire bring unique estate planning challenges. Your property alone may exceed the available nil-rate bands, before considering other assets.

The impact

Without planning, your family could face a 40% tax bill on everything above the threshold. That often means selling assets - potentially including the family home - to pay HMRC.

Our approach

rockwealth specialises in helping Cheltenham and Gloucestershire families structure their affairs to minimise inheritance tax legitimately. works alongside your solicitors and accountants to create a coordinated approach.

Key IHT numbers

2024/25
40%
The inheritance tax rate on estates above the threshold
£325k
The basic nil-rate band (frozen until 2030)
£175k
Additional residence nil-rate band per person
7 years
For gifts to become fully exempt from IHT

Source: GOV.UK Inheritance Tax thresholds

Watch our guide

Understanding Estate Planning

Learn how proper estate planning can protect your assets and ensure more of your wealth passes to those you love. This works alongside your retirement planning and overall tax planning strategy.

How we help

Strategies to reduce your inheritance tax bill

There's no single solution - effective estate planning combines multiple approaches tailored to your circumstances. Here are the main tools we use.

Strategic Gifting

Use annual exemptions, potentially exempt transfers, and regular gifts from income to reduce your estate over time.

Trust Planning

Trusts can protect assets, provide for family members, and reduce IHT. We help you understand which structures suit your goals.

Business Relief

Certain business assets qualify for 100% IHT relief. We identify opportunities and help you invest in qualifying assets.

Pension Planning

Pensions are typically outside your estate for IHT. We help you structure withdrawals to keep more wealth in tax-efficient pensions.

Life Insurance

Whole-of-life policies written in trust can provide funds to pay IHT bills, protecting assets you want to pass on.

Main Residence Relief

The residence nil-rate band can add £175,000 to your IHT threshold. We ensure you're structured to claim it.

Common estate planning questions from Cheltenham residents

My property has increased significantly - will my family face a huge IHT bill?

Potentially yes, but there are legitimate strategies to reduce this. We can help you understand the options: lifetime gifting, trusts, downsizing, or insurance to cover the bill.

When should I start estate planning?

The sooner the better. Many strategies require time to be fully effective - gifts take 7 years to become fully exempt. Starting early gives you more options and better outcomes.

Can I give my house to my children?

You can, but if you continue living there without paying market rent, it's a "gift with reservation" and stays in your estate. We can explain alternatives that actually work.

What about equity release to reduce IHT?

Equity release reduces your estate value and can fund gifts or lifestyle spending. But it has significant implications we'd need to discuss carefully as part of your overall plan.

Google Reviews

What our clients say

P
Peter Hansford

The rockwealth team has looked after my financial investments for many years, firstly advising on saving strategies during working life and then on through to creating a successful, personal retirement portfolio. For sound, honest and realistic advice then look no further, rockwealth is a credit to their profession and comes highly recommended.

P
Paul Farnworth & Jane Quinn

Tim and the team at rockwealth have been looking after our financial affairs for several years now. They made some changes to what we were doing previously and they're doing an amazing job and we can relax knowing that our finances are being taken care of thoughtfully and professionally. They are really proactive and always looking for the best ways to make maximum returns from our assets.

M
Mike & Rachel Tuffy

The world of pensions and investments is a minefield and one which we shied away from for too long. Matt managed to make the very complicated and confusing topic actually really easy to understand. We have no hesitation in recommending rockwealth and we feel secure in the fact that we have professionals looking after our hard earned cash who are able to talk to us and encourage us to think about life and what we want to get out of it.

I
Ian & Jane Nelder

We have been clients of rockwealth for a number of years now. The rockwealth team has been instrumental in shaping our savings and investment portfolio, including guiding us through making the biggest investment decision we're ever likely to make in respect of our pensions. The team always takes time to clearly explain options available. We've always found rockwealth to be a pleasure to deal with and expect our relationship to last for years to come.
